quests.title: Longest Dawn: First Recovery Loop
quests.objectiveReadNotice: Speak with Archivist Sena about the repeated seal.
quests.objectiveMetArchivist: Inspect the delayed supply crates by the storage yard.
quests.objectiveReviewedSupply: Anchor the first recovery beacon in the frame.
quests.objectiveCompleted: The first recovery loop is stable. Save the zone and continue from the latest slot.

quests.title: Longest Dawn: Observer Trace
quests.objectiveDefault: Inspect the observer record case by the archive fence.
quests.objectiveReadNotice: Inspect the observer record case by the archive fence.
quests.objectiveMetArchivist: Inspect the observer record case by the archive fence.
quests.objectiveReviewedSupply: Inspect the observer record case by the archive fence.
quests.objectiveCompleted: Observer trace recovered. Prepare the next district lead.
